## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`mvn test` / `npm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`mvn verify` / `npm run lint`)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-facing change)
